name: Jesus De Avila
intro: Creative professional with strong command of color theory, composition, and visual harmony, capable of building cohesive and engaging designs. Skilled in tools such as Photoshop, Illustrator, CorelDRAW, Animate, and embroidery software (Stitch), while also leveraging AI-powered design tools to streamline workflows and enhance creativity. Known for a sharp aesthetic sense, attention to detail, and the ability to adapt concepts across digital and print formats.
